description: Generalized intent JSON. ATTRIB_NAME/FIELD_ID/FIELD_VALUE/ENV_VALUE can repeat N times; renderer expands __FIELDS__ into dynamic selectors like input[__ATTRIB_NAME__='__FIELD_ID__'].
